# Generic follow-up template

> Reusable para cualquier partner sin respuesta. NO mandar más de 2
> follow-ups antes de marcar `dead` en CRM y activar fallback.

---

## Day +3 — Soft bump

**Subject** (reply to original thread, no nuevo thread):

```
Re: <original subject>
```

**Body:**

```
Hi {{TEAM}},

Bumping in case the original got buried. I know you receive a lot of
these — happy to make this easy on your end.

If you're the right person and just need a few days, no rush. If I
should redirect to someone else (BD, partnerships, sales), even a
one-liner helps.

Thanks,
{{FOUNDER_NAME}}
```

---

## Day +7 — Final follow-up (with optional escalation)

**Subject:**

```
Re: <original subject> (final note)
```

**Body:**

```
Hi {{TEAM}},

Last note from me on this thread — I'd hate to keep your inbox busy
without a clear answer.

For context: we're in active discovery for the Solana Frontier Hackathon
2026 (April 6 – May 11). If {{PARTNER_NAME}} can support during that
window, I'd love to connect. If not, we'll move forward with our
fallback (which is fine — we can always re-engage post-hackathon).

If there's a faster channel (Discord, Twitter, intro from a mutual),
also happy to use it.

All the best either way,
{{FOUNDER_NAME}}
{{FOUNDER_TITLE}} · Moneto
{{FOUNDER_EMAIL}} · {{FOUNDER_TWITTER}}
```

---

## Reglas

- **Reply al thread original** — no email nuevo. Hilo único = trackable.
- **No incluir el original quoted text** — los receptores recuerdan o
  buscan; aumenta el ruido.
- **Cero pasivo-agresivo**. "Final note" es honesto, no acusatorio.
- **Mencionar el deadline** del hackathon — context legítimo, no presión.
- **Si responden post-deadline**: seguir engagement (re-evaluamos
  post-hackathon, son partners potenciales para producción).

---

## Escalación lateral (paralelo al follow-up)

Si después de Day +3 no hay respuesta + el partner es **critical**:

| Partner | Canal de escalación                                     |
| ------- | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| Bold    | LinkedIn DM al co-founder Daniel Lascarro               |
| Rain    | Twitter DM `@raincards` + LinkedIn al CTO               |
| Privy   | Discord `#general`, post no genérico, mention sales rep |
| Persona | LinkedIn al VP Sales + Sumsub paralelo backup           |
| Helius  | Discord channel, Geyser team mention                    |
| Umbra   | TG `@umbra-team` directo                                |

**No escalar a CEO/founder a menos que sea Day +10**. Quema goodwill.

---

## CRM impact

Cada follow-up actualiza el `last_touch_date` en el CRM. Si después de
Day +10 no hay respuesta, mover status a `dead` y trigger fallback.
